title: CDX Core Annotations
description: Schema for the security/annotations.json file in a CDX document. Provides minimal annotation support for implementations that don't use the collaboration extension. Annotations are ADVISORY and UNAUTHENTICATED: they sit in no signature scope and are not bound by the manifest projection, so a verifier MUST NOT treat an annotation's author or content as authenticated (security extension, Identity Authority).

author.description: Advisory author name or identifier — NOT authenticated (the annotation sits in no signature scope). A DID-shaped value here is not an authenticated identity; see the security extension, Identity Authority.
